battleTraits.name: Shield of Azyr
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Turn, Your Hero Phase
battleTraits.effect: Pick a friendly unit. Until the start of your next turn, that unit has WARD (5+).

battleTraits.name: Storm Charge
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Battle, Your Charge Phase
battleTraits.effect: Pick a friendly unit that is not in combat. That unit can use CHARGE abilities this turn even if it used a RUN ability in the same turn.

enhancements.name: Morrda's Talon
enhancements.effect: Your general's Hallowed Greataxe has Crit (Mortal).

enhancements.name: Quicksilver Draught
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
enhancements.effect: Your general has STRIKE-FIRST this phase.

enhancements.name: Null Pendant
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, End of Any Turn
enhancements.effect: Roll a dice for each enemy unit contesting the same objective as your general. On a 2+, subtract the roll from the control score of that enemy unit this turn.

regimentAbilities.name: Strike Where Needed
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Battle, Reaction: You declared a RETREAT ability
regimentAbilities.effect: No mortal damage is inflicted by that RETREAT. In addition, that unit can still use CHARGE abilities this turn even though it retreated.

regimentAbilities.name: Blaze of Glory
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
regimentAbilities.effect: Pick a friendly unit in combat. Until end of phase, each time a model in that unit is slain, make a vengeance roll of D6. On a 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on an enemy unit in combat with that unit.

abilities.name: Deliver Judgement
abilities.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
abilities.effect: Pick a friendly non-HERO unit wholly within 12". The target can use 2 FIGHT abilities this phase. After the first, it has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the phase.

abilities.name: Plan the Attack
abilities.effect: Pick an objective you do not control. For the rest of the turn, add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks made by friendly units that target enemy units contesting that objective.

abilities.name: Sense Unholy Sorcery
abilities.effect: This unit's Gryph-crow is a token. This unit has WARD (5+) while its Gryph-crow is on the battlefield. If you make an unmodified ward roll of 1 for this unit, remove its Gryph-crow.

abilities.name: Cleansing Fires
abilities.effect: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12", make a chanting roll of D6. On a 3+, roll a dice for each model in the target. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage.

abilities.name: Skirmishers
abilities.effect: This unit has a coherency range of 2".

abilities.name: Heralds of Righteousness
abilities.effect: When you make a charge roll for this unit, roll 1 additional dice.

abilities.name: Stalwart Defenders
abilities.effect: Add 3 to this unit's control score while it contests an objective wholly within friendly territory.
